meta.title: Terms of Use — AI Game Connect
meta.description: Read the preview terms for AI Game Connect, including safety rules, approved places, no betting, no gambling, no poker, and pre-launch terms.

hero.title: Terms of Use placeholder.
hero.body: This is an honest placeholder for the preview website. Final terms will be published before launch.

sections.title: Preview terms notes.
sections.body: This page is not a final legal document.

blocks.title: Safety rules
paragraphs: AI Game Connect is designed for healthy real-life competition. No betting. No gambling. No poker. No private places. Approved venues, fields, courts, and activity spaces only. Clear time, location, pricing, and rules.
items: Approved venues, fields, and courts only

blocks.title: Pre-launch / preview mode
paragraphs: This website is in pre-launch preview mode. It does not include real login, payments, active leaderboard profiles, active rewards, a custom backend, or a real chatbot.

blocks.title: Final terms before launch
paragraphs: Final Terms of Use will be published before public launch and before live account, competition, ranking, or reward features are activated.

sections.title: Terms questions.
sections.body: A quick clarification about this placeholder.
